scope: ignored live Microsoft 365 probes for #624 Agent PendingAction confirmation

token_handling.cleanup: temporary token file removed after remote test run
token_handling.evidence_policy: no token value, account identifier, item id, permission id, message id, share URL, OAuth query string, or raw body content is recorded

command: cargo remote -b ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN=<redacted> -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers -- --ignored live_issue_624_agent_confirm_

proof: TestProviderScript emitted a destructive live-write create_draft action.
Public tool_call input was redacted before PendingAction registration and did not contain recipient or body sentinel.
AgentHandler::confirm executed through DesktopAgentOperations with a real Microsoft Graph Mail.ReadWrite token.
Graph returned a draft id through the confirmed result summary.
Drop cleanup deleted the created draft through GraphClient::delete_message.
Test created a temporary OneDrive fixture file using conflictBehavior=fail.
TestProviderScript emitted a destructive share link action for the fixture item.
Public tool_call input was redacted and retained only non-sensitive link metadata.
AgentHandler::confirm executed through DesktopAgentOperations and the existing share handler path with a real Files.ReadWrite token.
Graph permission listing found a direct, non-inherited anonymous view link.
Drop cleanup deleted the created permission and temporary OneDrive item.

RestoreCloud live confirmation was not run in this session. A live ignored probe now exists and compile-checks, but ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN_FILE and ISY624_M365_WRITE_TOKEN were unset.
RestoreLocal live proof remains host-fixture based; no personal restored content is recorded.

proof_when_seeded: TestProviderScript emits a destructive backup action.
Public tool_call input is redacted before PendingAction registration.
The shared backup runner performs a real mail refresh using cached token material.
The Store run log contains a backup run with ok status.
Test seeds a synthetic archived mail body in the temporary Store archive.
TestProviderScript emits a destructive restore-cloud action.
AgentHandler::confirm executes through DesktopAgentOperations and the existing engine restore_cloud path.
Graph readback verifies the newly created restored message.
The Store restore_operations row is committed and carries the new cloud id.
